condition.statement:
const threeDS = '{{3ds}}'
const hosted = '{{hosted}}'
const savedCC = '{{savedCC}}'
const challenge = '{{challenge}}'
const transactionType = '{{transactionType}}'
const payForOrder = '{{payForOrder}}'

return  threeDS === 'active' 
        &&
        hosted === 'session' 
        &&
        savedCC !== 'yes'
        &&
        challenge !== 'yes' 
        &&
        payForOrder !== 'yes'
        &&
        (
            transactionType === 'capture' 
            ||
            transactionType === 'authorize'
        )
